chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Civil Transfer Appl. No.48 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of main case 12.08.2024. Mr. Nazar Iqbal, advocate for applicant. = This Transfer application has been filed by the applicant in family suit for Khulla filed by respondent against him on the ground that respondent is resident of District South as mentioned in her Nikahnama but she has filed family suit in the court having jurisdiction of District East. Ms. Maria Tahir, advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent and denied the same. She submits that address given by the respondent/plaintiff in the plaint is correct and she is residing in Soldier Bazar, which comes within District East. In Family Suit jurisdiction is determined either on permanent or temporary residence of plaintiff. Still evidence has not been recorded and the fact of residence at either place has not been confronted to the respondent, therefore, this transfer application is premature and not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE A.K
